description: Creates a line on a 2D graph using polar form, specifying a length and angle in degrees. Can originate from the graph origin or from a specified origin point.
utility: Draw a line using polar coordinates (length and angle)

arguments.name: origin
arguments.description: Origin point (defaults to graph origin if omitted)

alternates.description: Line of given length at given angle (degrees) from origin
Line of given length at given angle from a specified origin point

examples.scenario: Polar line of length 5 at 45 degrees from origin
Polar line from a specific point
